title: All Tropical Fish Datapack
description: This datapack allows you to collect all 3072 tropical fish variants in Minecraft with a "fishdex" on advancements gui.
body:
This datapack allows you to collect all 3072 tropical fish variants in Minecraft with a "fishdex" on advancements gui. 
If you catch e'm all, you gained 3072 levels for completing this datapack.

This data pack require [All Tropical Fish Collection](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/all-tropical-fish-collection) resource pack to work.

![The main advancement tab with a blue coral background. An advancement that requires you to fish all tropical fish and 12 categories of fish, each requiring 256 tropical fish to fish.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36eae2fe14f04923d06839c317d1b5378ef8999c.png)

Mod like [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) (Forge) or [Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginatedadvancements) (Fabric, with [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)) is recommended to enlarge the size of the advancement GUI.
